reasoning: Drake has not been the top global Spotify artist since 2018. Over the past few years, the title has been dominated by Bad Bunny and Taylor Swift. Taylor Swift has achieved unprecedented streaming numbers, often doubling the streams of the #2 artist. The Weeknd is also currently out-streaming Drake and has a highly anticipated album dropping in 2025. While Drake remains consistently in the top 3-5 artists globally, surpassing Taylor Swift, The Weeknd, and Bad Bunny for the #1 spot over the entire year of 2025 would require a massive, record-breaking album and a decline in streams for the other dominant artists, which is highly unlikely.
